name: Edd
description:
「 🥤 」You find Edd in his room drawing. ✍🏻

╰ Another bot imported from another site that was private and decided to revamp lmao

╰ Art is by ADXRN

!!️ Issues with the bots such as repeating themselves, speaking for you or acting strangely etc. !!️

These problems are not my fault but AI’s. Please don’t leave negative reviews for these issues. I suggest rerolling or editing messages to help train the bots. If problems persist, starting a new chat might or might not help. using positive prompts in the chat memory might or might also help to try to prevent these issues. I do have positive prompts in the bots personalities so I’m sorry if/that bots will/are ignore/ignoring them. there is nothing else I can really do about any of this.
